education_required: ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making
raw_text:
12. Press Tool Maker

Job Summary  
Specializes in manufacturing tools used in press machines for cutting, bending, and forming 
sheet metal.  
Key Responsibilities  
• Manufacture press tools and dies  
• Perform die setting and alignmen t  
• Support production press operations  
• Conduct tool maintenance and repairs  
• Optimize tool performance  
Required Skills  
• Knowledge of press operations and tooling  
• Sheet metal forming expertise  
• Machining and fitting skills  
• Troubleshooting ability  
Qualif ication  
• ITI / Diploma in Tool & Die Making  
Experience  
• 3–6 years  
Salary (India)  
• ₹22,000 – ₹40,000 per month
